titles.title: Kizoku Tensei: Megumareta Umare kara Saikyou no Chikara wo Eru
貴族転生 ～恵まれた生まれから最強の力を得る～
Noble Reincarnation: Born Blessed, So I'll Obtain Ultimate Power

data.title: Kizoku Tensei: Megumareta Umare kara Saikyou no Chikara wo Eru
data.title_english: Noble Reincarnation: Born Blessed, So I'll Obtain Ultimate Power
data.title_japanese: 貴族転生 ～恵まれた生まれから最強の力を得る～
data.synopsis:
Noah Ararat is born into privilege as the 13th prince of an imperial dynasty and granted an existence most can only envy. After all, apart from the access to the empire's finest education and resources, Noah is a reincarnator with the memories of his previous life intact, blessed with an infinite level cap and an elite ability that allows him to utilize his subordinates' skills.

Within the imperial court, however, status alone offers no guarantee of safety. While Noah's overwhelming potential sets him apart from his siblings from the moment he begins his training, it also draws the attention of nobles whose interests extend far beyond governance. Inevitably, Noah must learn to navigate the expectations of royalty and the mechanics of his unusual power, as he realizes that privilege invites control as readily as it grants it.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Fermat no Ryouri
data.synopsis:
Since childhood, Gaku Kitada has been fascinated with mathematics. As a student at the prestigious Wels Academy, he aimed to qualify for the Mathematics Olympiad and eventually secure admission to the University of Tokyo to become a great mathematician. His ambitious plans, however, do not come to fruition, as Gaku fails to qualify for the Olympiad's main event due to his anxiety and lack of self-confidence. This disastrous performance, coupled with his decision not to participate in future competitions, leads to his expulsion from the academy.

During this crisis, Gaku meets Kai Asakura, an enigmatic professional chef who recognizes Gaku's peculiar way of cooking that incorporates math to create perfectly synergistic dishes. Despite his initial reservations, Gaku begins to utilize his mathematical perspective to cook, rekindling his love for the subject in the process. Wanting to understand this impulse more, Gaku decides to pivot his career trajectory to one that melds numbers with flavors to find solutions that can satisfy both his mind and the palate of his customers.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Fermat no Ryouri aired on TV Asahi's IMAnimation block.
